channel.title: Resource-Management on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Resource-Management on Pi Stack

item.title: Node Problem Detector vs Node Feature Discovery vs Goldilocks — Kubernetes Node Management Tools Guide 2026
item.description: Running a healthy Kubernetes cluster requires more than just deploying workloads — you need visibility into node health, hardware capabilities, and resource utilization. Three specialized tools address different aspects of Kubernetes node management: Node Problem Detector for health monitoring, Node Feature Discovery for hardware awareness, and Goldilocks for resource optimization. This guide examines each tool’s role in maintaining a production-ready cluster.
